case_title: ARLETHA GREEN VS WILLIAMS TAM L, DBA CONCRETE CONTRACTORS & ASSO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY ARLETHA GREEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS TAM L, DBA CONCRETE CONTRACTORS & ASSO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS TAM L, DBA CONCRETE CONTRACTORS & ASSO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARLETHA GREEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS TAM L, DBA CONCRETE CONTRACTORS & ASSO. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,539.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
